description:
The Button component is an interactive UIX element that allows for users to click on its RectTransform. It can provide visual feedback by altering the colors of graphics on the RectTransform Slot, such as the Image component. This is able to trigger several other components, such as Text Field, by using the Button Events system.

}}

fields.BaseColor: The color that all other tints will be based on
fields.ColorDrivers: A list of sets of colors. Each one points at another component's color, and determines how it looks normally, when highlighted, when pressed, and when disabled
fields.IsPressed: True if the button is being pressed
fields.IsHovering: True if someone is hovering over the button
fields.HoverVibrate: How a controller should vibrate when hovering over this button
fields.PressVibrate: How a controller should vibrate when pressing this button
fields.ClearFocusOnPress: If set, will defocus any currently focused TextEditor, DesktopInteractionRelay, or any other IFocusable when this button is pressed. Defaults to true.
fields.PassThroughHorizontalMovement: Whether or not press-and-drag movement should be passed to higher components
fields.PassThroughVerticalMovement: Whether or not press-and-drag movement should be passed to higher components
fields.RequireInitialPress: Internal - Check for the initial press of the button. Defaults to true.
fields.PressPoint: The (x,y) coordinate where the button is being pressed
fields.SendSlotEvents: If set, all Pressing, Pressed, Released, HoverEnter, HoverStay, and HoverLeave events are sent to all IButtonPressReceiver components within this component's slot. Defaults to true.
fields.Pressed: Delegate. If set, this function is called with the Pressed event. Defaults to unset.
fields.Pressing: Delegate. If set, this function is called with the Pressing event. Defaults to unset.
fields.Released: Delegate. If set, this function is called with the Released event. Defaults to unset.
fields.HoverEnter: Delegate. If set, this function is called with the HoverEnter event. Defaults to unset.
fields.HoverStay: Delegate. If set, this function is called with the HoverStay event. Defaults to unset.
fields.HoverLeave: Delegate. If set, this function is called with the HoverLeave event. Defaults to unset.

usage: This can be used with ProtoFlux, and specifically the Button Events node. Allowing it to fire Impulses from this IButton reference.
